title: Codex type definitions for knowledge base topics and content
purpose: Defines TypeScript interfaces and types for representing knowledge base topics, their content, flags, and dashboard statistics in the Collab Codex system.
module_context: Exports type definitions for ConfidenceTier, Topic, TopicFlag, DashboardStats, TopicContent, and QueryResult that form the core data models for the knowledge base system.

steps.content: Define a type alias for confidence levels with high, medium, and low tiers.
Define an interface for knowledge base topics with name, title, confidence, and timestamp properties.
Include optional lastAccessed timestamp and accessCount for tracking usage.
Define an interface for topic flags indicating issues requiring attention.
Specify flag types including outdated, incomplete, incorrect, and needs-review.
Include timestamps for creation and optional resolution.
Define an interface for dashboard statistics aggregating topic and flag metrics.
Include counts for topics by confidence level, drafts, open flags, and stale topics.
Define an interface for topic content sections including summary, concepts, examples, gotchas, and diagrams.
Define an interface for query results containing both topic metadata and its content.
